'''Ean''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who served as a [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] officer aboard the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Cruiser/Legends|Cruiser]] [[Yavin (starship)|''Yavin'']] under [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].<ref name="TNR">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>

His name meant "wise" among the Mon Calamari.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
